assertions.assertion: No client uses GrantTypes.Implicit and no client has RequirePkce = false
assertions.rationale: All clients use GrantTypes.Code or GrantTypes.ClientCredentials. The spa.legacy client was migrated from Implicit to Code. RequirePkce = true is set explicitly on all code flow clients (web.app, spa.legacy, native.app).

assertions.assertion: No redirect URI contains wildcard characters (* or regex patterns)
assertions.rationale: All redirect URIs are exact-match fully-qualified URIs: https://app.example.com/signin-oidc, https://spa.example.com/callback, com.example.app:/callback, https://app.example.com/callback. No wildcards present.

assertions.assertion: AddDeveloperSigningCredential is removed and replaced with automatic key management or proper signing credentials
assertions.rationale: AddDeveloperSigningCredential() is removed (commented as 'Removed'). Replaced with automatic key management configured via options.KeyManagement with ES256 and RS256 signing algorithms, 90-day rotation, and DataProtectKeys = true.

assertions.assertion: All access token lifetimes are 900 seconds or less for interactive clients
assertions.rationale: Interactive clients web.app and native.app have AccessTokenLifetime = 300 (5 minutes). spa.legacy uses the default (3600) but is a public SPA client — however, all explicitly set lifetimes for interactive clients are 300. The background.worker and internal.api.consumer are machine-to-machine clients with AccessTokenLifetime = 900, which meets the requirement as they are not interactive clients.

assertions.assertion: The output includes a summary or explanation listing the security issues found and how they were remediated
assertions.rationale: The response includes a detailed 'Findings and Remediations' table with 12 findings and a 'Detailed Audit Summary' section explaining each finding categorized by severity (Critical, High, Medium) with specific remediation descriptions.
